# TrailSmoke

> Real-time 48-hour wildfire smoke forecast map for the USA, powered by NOAA HRRR data and active wildfire incident layers.

TrailSmoke shows interactive smoke plume forecasts and current wildfire locations so outdoor enthusiasts and health-conscious users can plan around poor air quality.

## Pages

- [Smoke Forecast Map](/): Interactive NOAA HRRR 48-hour wildfire smoke forecast with active fire incidents and per-city forecasts.
- [Privacy Reality Check](/privacy-reality): What data is recorded, how to clear it, and tools to improve browsing privacy.

## Optional

- [Analytics Dashboard](/analytics): Public engagement metrics for the TrailSmoke app.
